name: io.github.jschuller/mcp-server-servicenow
title: ServiceNow MCP Server
description: 18 MCP tools for ServiceNow — incidents, CMDB, update sets, system ops. OAuth 2.1 + PKCE, any SN version (Tokyo+), any MCP client.

environmentVariables.name: SERVICENOW_AUTH_TYPE
environmentVariables.description: Auth type: basic, oauth, or api_key

environmentVariables.name: SERVICENOW_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Username for basic or OAuth auth

environmentVariables.name: SERVICENOW_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Password for basic or OAuth auth
